name: 🏠 智能家居AI协调器 - 增强版

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO smart_home_logs (request_id, timestamp, user, source, command_type, device_type, action, scene, nl_input, entity_id, room, success, execution_time, learning_data) VALUES ('{{ $json.request_id }}', '{{ $json.timestamp }}', '{{ $json.user }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.command_type }}', '{{ $json.device_type }}', '{{ $json.action }}', '{{ $json.scene }}', '{{ $json.nl_input }}', '{{ $json.entity_id }}', '{{ $json.room }}', {{ $json.success }}, {{ $json.execution_time }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.learning_data) }}')
